steps.expected: HTTP 200 with JSON array of session DTOs containing id, workspaceId, name, lastMessageAt, isProcessing, sessionStatus
steps.observed: HTTP 200 with JSON array; required fields present on each session

evidence.network: GET /api/workspaces/default/sessions -> 200; response array includes required fields
evidence.notes: python3 validation confirmed required keys present

assertions.title: Create session returns new session DTO

steps.observed: HTTP 201; returned id session-2 with DTO fields

assertions.title: Get session with message history

steps.expected: HTTP 200 with messages array containing message content

evidence.network: GET /api/sessions/session-2 -> 200; messages array present but empty

assertions.issues: Test server provides no API to create or seed messages; unable to produce message content for validation. Session responses include messages: [] only.

assertions.title: Delete session removes and emits event

evidence.sse: session_deleted event observed in SSE log

steps.action: Parse JSON from session list and session detail responses
steps.expected: JSON.parse succeeds; timestamps are numbers; optional fields are null/omitted
steps.observed: JSON parsed successfully; lastMessageAt is integer; hasMore is boolean; nullable fields return null

evidence.network: GET /api/workspaces/default/sessions and GET /api/sessions/session-2 both parse as JSON
evidence.notes: python3 checks confirmed lastMessageAt is int and hasMore is boolean

steps.observed: HTTP 404 with {code: session_not_found, message: Session not found}

assertions.title: CreateSessionOptions fields honored

steps.expected: Returned DTO includes name, permissionMode, workingDirectory
steps.observed: Returned DTO includes name and permissionMode; workingDirectory missing

evidence.network: POST /api/workspaces/default/sessions -> 201 with no workingDirectory field; GET /api/sessions/session-2 -> 200 without workingDirectory

assertions.issues: workingDirectory is accepted on create but is not serialized in SessionDTO responses.

steps.expected: HTTP 200 with messages array and pagination metadata (hasMore, nextCursor)
steps.observed: HTTP 200 with messages: [], hasMore: false, nextCursor: null
HTTP 400 invalid_query (limit must be a positive integer)

blockers.description: Test server has no API to create or seed message history; unable to validate message content requirement for VAL-GW-005.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Queried session detail and inspected test server routes; no message creation endpoint available.
